source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Given the sampled control system as shown in <image>, with a sampling period of \( T + 1 \) s, determine the range of values for \( k \) that will ensure system stability.
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The system is stable when \( 0 < k < 5.77 \).

choice_map.C: The system is stable when \( 0 < k < 5.77 \).
choice_map.D: The system is stable when \( 0 < k < 5.0 \).
